arguments.summary: Read linkedlist/singly.py — Node(value, next), LinkedList with append, to_list, and reverse stub. Need to implement in-place reversal by flipping next pointers.

next_steps.description: Implement reverse() in linkedlist/singly.py using three-pointer technique

arguments.content:
def reverse(self):
        prev = None
        current = self.head
        while current:
            next_node = current.next
            current.next = prev
            prev = current
            current = next_node
        self.head = prev
